case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. KHALEEL ALMALAK

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI-COMMUNITY RELATIONS PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALMALAK, KHALEEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - $50 SERVICE FEE SERVED SEP-17-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALMALAK, KHALEEL
